author: wickedmike
body: Bloody hell, you are right! Majestic! Looking forward to their album the most.

author: wickedmike
body: Nice to see you joining the WordPress crew. If a .org rather than a .com, check out the Comment Luv widget.

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Mike, glad to see you around these parts!  
I’ve been using WordPress since the very start of this blog back in 2007 ; ) I used to actually use the comment luv widget, but stripped out as many plugins as I could recently… too much bloat on loading times.

Hope all’s well that side.
